name: American Express Cobalt Card
welcome_bonus_description: Earn 15,000 Membership Rewards points after spending $750 per month for the first 12 months.
rewards_summary: 5x points on eats and drinks (incl. groceries), 3x on streaming, 2x on transit and gas, 1x on everything else. Points worth approximately 2 cents each when redeemed for travel.
insurance_summary: Includes travel emergency medical (up to 15 days for under-65s), trip interruption, flight delay, baggage delay, hotel/motel burglary, car rental theft and damage, purchase protection (90 days), and buyer's assurance (extended warranty).

name: Scotiabank Passport Visa Infinite
welcome_bonus_description: Earn up to 35,000 Scene+ points in the first year with qualifying purchases.
rewards_summary: 3x Scene+ points on grocery, dining, entertainment, and daily transit; 2x on select streaming services and rideshare; 1x on everything else. NO foreign transaction fee. Six complimentary airport lounge passes per year.
insurance_summary: Comprehensive travel package including travel emergency medical (up to 25 days under 65), trip cancellation, trip interruption, flight delay, baggage insurance, hotel burglary, rental car collision/loss damage. Mobile device insurance up to $1,000. Purchase security and extended warranty.

name: Tangerine Money-Back Credit Card
welcome_bonus_description: Earn an extra 10% back (up to $100) in the first 2 months on up to $1,000 in everyday purchases.
rewards_summary: 2% unlimited cashback in 2 categories you choose (3 if you deposit cashback into a Tangerine Savings account); 0.50% on everything else. Categories include groceries, gas, restaurants, hotels, recurring bills, drug store, entertainment, public transit, home improvement, and furniture.
insurance_summary: Includes purchase assurance (90 days against theft/damage) and extended warranty (doubles manufacturer warranty up to 1 year). NO travel insurance. Mobile device insurance up to $1,000 when bills are paid with this card.

name: RBC Avion Visa Infinite
welcome_bonus_description: Earn 35,000 Avion points upon approval (worth approximately $700 in travel value).
rewards_summary: 1.25x Avion points per $1 on travel, 1x on everything else. Avion points are flexible â€” book any flight with no blackout dates, transfer to airline partners (Aeroplan, British Airways, Cathay Pacific, WestJet), or redeem for merchandise/gift cards.
insurance_summary: Includes travel emergency medical (15 days for under 65), trip cancellation/interruption, flight delay, baggage delay/loss, auto rental collision/loss damage, hotel/motel burglary. Purchase security 90 days, extended warranty doubles manufacturer up to 1 year.

name: Rogers Red Mastercard
welcome_bonus_description: Earn $30 cashback after first purchase within 90 days.
rewards_summary: 1.5% unlimited cashback on all purchases in Canadian dollars; 3% cashback on purchases in US dollars. Cashback redeemed against any Rogers/Fido/Shaw bill, or as statement credit. NO annual fee.
insurance_summary: Purchase assurance (90 days against theft/damage), extended warranty (doubles manufacturer up to 1 year). NO travel insurance. Mastercard zero liability for unauthorized use.
